service.name: WG-Fireware-XTM-WebUI
service.description: WatchGuard Configuration and Monitoring using Fireware OS Web UI

service.name: Auth
service.description: A protocol used to map a certain TCP connection to a username

service.name: Entrust
service.description: Entrust Administration and Key Management Services

service.name: IPSec
service.description: IPSec is a VPN tunnelling protocol with encryption

service.name: LDAP-SSL
service.description: Lightweight Directory Access Protocol over TLS/SSL

service.name: OSPF
service.description: Open Shortest Path First - Interior Gateway Routing Protocol

service.name: Ping
service.description: ICMP Message - Echo Request and Echo Reply

service.name: RADIUS-Accounting
service.description: Remote Authentication Dial-In User Accounting Services

service.name: RADIUS-RFC
service.description: RFC Remote Authentication Dial-In User Services

service.name: RADIUS-Acct-RFC
service.description: RFC Remote Authentication Dial-In User Accounting Services

service.name: RealPlayerG2
service.description: RealPlayer G2, v7, v8 Media Streaming Protocol

service.name: SQL-Server
service.description: a Access to Sybase Central and SQL Advantage software

service.name: TACACS
service.description: Terminal Access Controller Access Control System

service.name: TACACS+
service.description: Terminal Access Controller Access Control System

service.name: Timbuktu
service.description: Remote Control and File Transfer Software

service.name: WG-SmallOffice-Mgmt
service.description: Secure Access to Soho boxes via a Web Browser

service.name: SSL-VPN
service.description: Built-in policy template for SSL VPN.

service.name: WG-LogViewer-ReportMgr.1
service.description: WatchGuard Log Viewer and Report Manager

service.name: WG-LogViewer-ReportMgr.2
service.description: WatchGuard Log Viewer and Report Manager

service.name: WG-LogViewer-ReportMgr.3
service.description: WatchGuard Log Viewer and Report Manager

service.name: WG-LogViewer-ReportMgr
service.description: WatchGuard Log Viewer and Report Manager

service.name: WG-Gateway-Wireless-Controller
service.description: Allow the XTM device to receive data from the WAPs.

service.name: WG-Cloud-Managed-WiFi
service.description: The WatchGuard Wi-Fi Cloud policy enables WatchGuard AP devices to communicate with Wi-Fi Cloud servers.

service.name: WG-TDR-Host-Sensor
service.description: WatchGuard Threat Detection and Response Host Sensor

service.name: Blocked Ports
service.description: Built-in policy type for blocked ports.

service.name: HTTP HTTPS - Players INES site Rambouillet
Serveur Unity
service.description: NAT vers serveur Unity MacMini COM

nat.name: Log Watchguard
nat.description: Nat vers station de log server

ike-action.description: Shared by IKEv2 gateways with dynamic peers

ike-policy.name: WG Default IKEv2 Gateway
ike-policy.description: Shared by IKEv2 gateways with dynamic peers

schedule.name: Pauses
schedule.description: Lundi a samedi, de 8 a 9h, de 12 a 14h et de 18 a 19h

app-action.name: LAN Basique Tablettes
app-action.description: Etendu transferts + reseaux sociaux + update microsoft pour WS

app-action.name: LAN Blocage
app-action.description: Application control pour les utilisateurs sans charte informatique

app-action.name: LAN Pauses
app-action.description: Standard + videos, radios, transferts espaces persos - Controles actifs de 08 a 09h, de 12 a 14h et de 18 a 19h, la semaine

app-action.name: LAN Pauses Soc
app-action.description: Std + videos, radios, transferts esp. persos + FB, Twitter, LinkedIn, Apple, Viadeo - De 08 a 09h, de 12 a 14h et de 18 a 19h,

app-action.name: LAN Standard
app-action.description: Navigateurs et surf Internet de base, AOL, GMail, applis Google, Hotmail, JAVA, flux RSS, SWF, Netviewer

app-action.name: LAN Std Vid Soc
app-action.description: Bas. + Dailymo, Win Med Play, Youtube, MySpace, Realplayer, SWF, MP4, FLV, Webex, Flickr, res. sociaux

app-action.name: LAN Std Vid Transf
app-action.description: Basique + Dailymotion, Windows Media Player, Youtube, MySpace, SWF, Flv, MP4, Realplayer, Flickr, Dropbox, Google Drive, Yousen

app-action.name: LAN Std Vid Transf Soc
app-action.description: Bas. + Videos + Flickr, Dropbox, Google Drive, Yousendit + res. sociaux + Apple

app-action.name: LAN Std Videos
app-action.description: Basique + Dailymotion, Windows Media Player, Youtube, MySpace, Realplayer, SWF, MP4, FLV, Webex, Flickr

app-action.name: Ouvert Social Wifi Med Ext Domaine
app-action.description: Std + videos, radios, transferts esp. persos + FB, Twitter, LinkedIn, Apple, Viadeo
